title: phanera bidentata var. cornifolia
intro: Phanera bidentata var. cornifolia, also known as the Himalayan rattan vine or Himalayan climbing palm, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phanera bidentata var. cornifolia include reducing fever and pain, as well as treating various skin conditions and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
